prompt: Create a low-angle cinematic fashion editorial photo of an adult East Asian woman in her 20s posing dramatically in a dark urban interior at night. She is standing with her torso arched, both arms lifted behind and above her head, eyes half closed, calm confident expression, viewed from below to make her legs and body appear elongated. Outfit: an open oversized blue denim jacket slipping off the shoulders, a simple black bandeau crop top, very short dark denim shorts, and a wide dark leather belt with large round metal studs and buckle details. Lighting is moody and high contrast, with a narrow hard spotlight from the left illuminating her skin and leaving much of the background in deep shadow. Background: nearly black industrial room or parking-garage-like space with a dark ceiling, one vertical wall edge, faint city lights or small blurred lights in the distance on the lower right. Use realistic skin texture, subtle makeup, glossy lips, dark hair loosely pulled back with a few strands near the face. Composition: vertical 2:3 frame, subject centered slightly left, head near upper third, legs cropped near the bottom edge, strong perspective distortion from a wide-angle lens. Style: photorealistic, cinematic night photography, fashion magazine editorial, shallow depth of field, dramatic shadows, cool blue-black color grading, no text, no watermark.

promptZh: 创作一张低角度电影感时尚大片，拍摄一位 20 多岁的东亚成年女性 在夜晚昏暗的城市室内空间中摆出极具张力的姿势。她身体呈拱形站立，双臂抬起置于脑后上方，双眼微闭，表情冷静自信，采用仰拍视角以拉长腿部和身体线条。服装：一件从肩部滑落的超大款 蓝色牛仔外套，内搭简约的 黑色抹胸短上衣，搭配超短深色牛仔短裤，以及一条带有大号圆形金属铆钉和扣饰的宽版深色皮带。灯光氛围忧郁且对比强烈，左侧射入一道狭窄的硬光，照亮她的皮肤，背景大部分隐没在深邃的阴影中。背景：近乎全黑的工业风房间或类似停车场的空间，有深色天花板、一处垂直墙角，右下方远处有微弱的城市灯光或模糊的小光点。使用逼真的皮肤纹理、精致的妆容、亮面唇妆，深色头发松散地向后梳，脸颊旁留有几缕发丝。构图：2:3 纵向画幅，主体略微偏左居中，头部位于上方三分之一处，腿部在底部边缘附近截断，广角镜头带来强烈的透视畸变。风格：照片级真实感、电影感夜间摄影、时尚杂志大片、浅景深、戏剧性阴影、冷蓝黑色调，无文字，无水印。
